prompts.name: sala_de_estar_livre
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional photography:
Rooftop terrace of a historic building in the heart of a Mediterranean city. The setting boasts elegant, timeworn architecture with intricate stonework, vibrant terra cotta tiles, and lush greenery cascading from colorful planters. Golden hour sunlight bathes the scene, casting long shadows and warm tones over the space. A traditional coffeehouse occupies one corner of the terrace, with a rustic wooden bar adorned with vintage ceramic cups and brass details. The coffeehouse exudes an inviting ambiance, with a cloud of steam rising from freshly brewed espresso. A wrought-iron balcony extends along the backdrop, framing picturesque views of nearby buildings boasting cultural heritage and European charm. Exotic plants in vibrant pots are interspersed throughout the terrace, adding to its exotic escape appeal. The whole scene is artfully composed with a focus on the coffeehouse as the centerpiece, while the Mediterranean design elements harmoniously blend into the backdrop, creating an idyllic retreat that feels both familiar and foreign.
Canon EOS R5, 16-35mm f/2.8, f/11, ISO 100, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: sala_de_estar_livre_2
prompts.text: Medium format RAW capture, professional photography: Intimate corner of an antique library within a grand European chateau. The warm glow of sunset filters through arched windows, casting long shadows across aged leather armchairs and vintage books lining the shelves. A small wooden table with a steaming cup of coffee sits between two worn velvet sofas, their rich burgundy color contrasting against the dusty yellow hue of the library walls. The atmosphere is one of serene relaxation amidst cultural heritage, the exotic escape being found in the rare Mediterranean-inspired design elements scattered throughout the space. The composition focuses on the inviting nook, with a slight tilt towards the coffee and books, emphasizing the harmonious blend of tradition and modernity that encapsulates this historic study. Hasselblad X2D, 45mm f/3.5, f/8, ISO 64, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: sala_de_estar_livre_3
prompts.text: RAW photo, professional photography: Cozy nook within an ancient coffeehouse at dusk, European Charm permeates the air as warm golden light cascades through antique stained-glass windows, illuminating intricate Mediterranean design elements and traditional decor. The atmosphere is serene yet inviting, filled with the aroma of freshly brewed coffee and aged leather. Exotic escape echoes in the faded wall tapestries, while the historic architecture showcases grand arches and intricately carved woodwork. Composition focuses on a vintage coffee table laden with rustic mugs and vintage books nestled under the embrace of ancient stone walls, leading the viewer's eye to the picturesque outdoor seating area beyond, framed by vibrant foliage casting long shadows. Canon EOS R5, 24mm f/11, 30s long exposure, ISO 100, ND filter, ultra realistic, National Geographic.
